---
title: "Project Portfolio"
format:
  html:
    allow-html: true
    css: styles-dark.css
---


## Statistical Arbitrage Systems

<div align="center">
  <img src="images/Stat_Arb.png" alt="Stat Arb Strategies" class="project-image">
  <br>
  <a href="https://github.com/chayman7771/Statistical-Arbitrage-Systems" target="_blank" class="gh-badge">
    <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/View%20on-GitHub-24292f?logo=github&logoColor=white" alt="GitHub Repo Badge"> View Code
  </a>
</div>
<p align="center" class="project-desc">
  <em>
  Offering three methods of strategy testing through live, historical, and simulated data, 
  this full-stack system deploys and compares strategies while recording all trades and 
  summary statistics--as they occur--via trade logs. Available through a Dash UI, 
  these python scripts converge together to conveniently display a PnL curve for each strategy, 
  and a comparison PnL plot overlay of each curve as well.
  </em>
</p>

---

## Geo-Spatial Latency Arbitrage

<div align="center">
  <img src="images/Latency_Arbitrage.png" alt="Geo-Spatial Latency Arbitrage" class="project-image">
  <br>
  <a href="https://github.com/chayman7771/Quantisphere" target="_blank" class="gh-badge">
    <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/View%20on-GitHub-24292f?logo=github&logoColor=white" alt="GitHub Repo Badge"> View Code
  </a>
</div>
<p align="center" class="project-desc">
  <em>
  Quantisphere is a Kubernetes-orchestrated, microservices-based platform that ingests high-frequency 
  market data via Kafka, stores it in Parquet files (upgradable to kdb+) for ultra-low-latency 
  time-series analytics, and seamlessly integrates Python-powered machine-learning models for real-time 
  arbitrage signal generation. Its global latency map and WebSocket-driven dashboard provide sub-millisecond 
  visibility into cross-exchange spreads, while Prometheus and Grafana ensure comprehensive observability, 
  alerting, and performance monitoring at every stage of the data pipeline. Together, these components enable 
  systematic identification and execution of latency arbitrage opportunities with enterprise-grade reliability 
  and scalability.
  </em>
</p>

---

## Alternative Data Processing Methods

<div align="center">
  <img src="images/NLP_Pipelines.png" alt="Alt Data NLP Pipeline" class="project-image">
  <br>
  <a href="https://github.com/chayman7771/Forecasting-Models" target="_blank" class="gh-badge">
    <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/View%20on-GitHub-24292f?logo=github&logoColor=white" alt="GitHub Repo Badge"> View Code
  </a>
</div>
<p align="center" class="project-desc">
  <em>
  Extracts alpha from 10-Qs, earnings calls, and filings using transformer models and integrates them into multifactor engines.
  </em>
</p>

---

## Monte Carlo, GARCH, ARIMA & Other Forecasting Models

<div align="center">
  <img src="images/Monte_Carlo_and_Forecasting.png" alt="Monte Carlo + GARCH Forecasting" class="project-image">
  <br>
  <a href="https://github.com/chayman7771/Forecasting-Models" target="_blank" class="gh-badge">
    <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/View%20on-GitHub-24292f?logo=github&logoColor=white" alt="GitHub Repo Badge"> View Code
  </a>
</div>
<p align="center" class="project-desc">
  <em>
  Equity price prediction engine combining time-series simulation and stochastic volatility models (R, ggplot2).
  </em>
</p>
